# Codicons subset

This directory vendors the Codicons font from `@vscode/codicons` version `0.0.40`.

- Source: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-codicons
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@vscode/codicons
- Font license: CC-BY-4.0, see `LICENSE`
- Source-code license notice from upstream package: see `LICENSE-CODE`

Only the bundled `codicon.ttf` font is loaded by the application. The project does not use the Visual Studio Code product name, logo, Marketplace assets, or Microsoft branding.
